name: CRYO-GEN & ZLDR Wednesday Workout RUN
description:
Join our CRYO-GEN & ZLDR Wednesday Workout Run. It is our collaborative event between CRYO-GEN and ZLDR. The goals are to run together, share the FUN and stay healthy as one zwift run community. We do workout every Wednesday, feel free to join and have FUN on your mid week. You can set the bias up or down if needed too.

To find out more about Team CRYO-GEN and what we can offer you, please visit our website https://cryogen.team/

If you wish to join us on Discord for this run, please join our server here - https://discord.gg/MkEpFwNz

name: Stage 1: Zwift Games: Kaze Kicker | Women Only
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: DIRT 505 Wednesday Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to the DIRT 505 Wednesday Endurance Ride!

Please join us weekly on Wednesdays at a pace of 2.6-2.8w/kg for 90 minutes.

The 505 rides take place Monday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday for 90 minutes at the same time and same consistent pace. Saturday's we ride for 120 minutes.

We kick off our rides with a 5 minute pace at 2.2w/kg to get us warmed up and together as a team. The fence is used throughout the ride to keep everyone together. The fence will not kick you off the ride but we do encourage all our riders to stay together as close to the beacon as possible. Our rides offer a 30 minute late join option.
The ride leader will stay as close to ride pace as possible. We try to change up the routes each week and some of the routes may include some small to moderate climbs.

Our group exists to encourage and build up cyclists around the world, no matter your time zone, fitness level, pro or amateur. We exist to encourage and build up a team culture of unity in the cycling community.

STRAVA DIRT CLUB:

https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwiftdirt

FACEBOOK DIRT GROUP:

https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftdirt

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

description:
The ODZ Coffee Ride is a group ride formatted to allow a steady 2.5w/kg warmup, followed by an all out ‘Espresso segment’.  Riders must be BEHIND rider leader at the start of the ‘Espresso segment’ to be included in final results.  Watch in messaging closely for instructions during ride.  

Save ride with ODZ and (Category) after race. i.e. T. Zwift ODZ Coffee (A). Go to http://www.teamodz.com/coffee-ride/ for a full description.

A: 4.0 W/kg FTP or higher 
B: 3.2 W/kg to 3.99 W/kg FTP 
C: 2.5 W/kg to 3.19 W/kg FTP 
D: Under 2.49 W/kg FTP

name: Workout Wednesday Run
description:
Join the Zwift Runners for a group run workout that will be of benefit to all distance runners.

The speeds for each group are based on a threshold speed of A group 15 kph, B 13 kph, C 11 kph, D 9 kph. We will start the intervals at that speed but increase the speed of the intervals we get into the workout. We encourage runners to choose the group closest to the effort level you want to run at and to keep to the nominal speed for that group to maintain the group dynamic. However if these speeds are significantly too low or high for you then you can choose to run in the group that is closest and then adjust the target speed up to 10% up or down in the game or via the Companion app.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Running in general then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook group or zwift.com/run #gozwiftrun #wow

Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt5 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Xert Surplus Seeker Ride
description:
This is a friendly group ride for users of Xert, want-to-be-users of Xert, or anyone from around the world who’d like to ride Wednesdays in a social, friendly setting. Difficulty is low as we will aim to ride together at a pace of 2.0-2.5 W/kg every week to build XSS (strain). The ride will be hosted by the team at Xert so while we’re primarily here to meet riders in the best way we know how - from the saddles of our bikes -  we’ll happily answer questions about the system (oxygen availability depending!). We will do our best to keep the group together so please keep your eyes open for a virtual tug on the jersey pocket (messages)..

Our Discord voice channel can be found @ https://discord.gg/Uqkd2Rx

name: Bikealicious Highnoon-Heroes
description:
It’s high noon… and the real heroes are on their bikes.

Join the Bikealicious Highnoon-Heroes every Wednesday for one glorious hour of midday spin therapy.



This is a Banded Ride, which means:



Nobody gets dropped

Nobody has to chase

Everybody stays together like a well-oiled peloton sandwich



Expect an easy, recovery-friendly pace, perfect for shaking out tired legs, escaping the lunch break, or just pretending you’re working while Zwifting instead. Chat, laugh, spin — watts are optional, good vibes are mandatory.

eventSubgroups.name: Bikealicious Highnoon-Heroes (E)
eventSubgroups.description:
It’s high noon… and the real heroes are on their bikes.
Join the Bikealicious Highnoon-Heroes every Wednesday at 12:00 CET for one glorious hour of midday spin therapy.

This is a Banded Ride, which means:

Nobody gets dropped
Nobody has to chase
Everybody stays together like a well-oiled peloton sandwich

Expect an easy, recovery-friendly pace, perfect for shaking out tired legs, escaping the lunch break, or just pretending you’re working while Zwifting instead. Chat, laugh, spin — watts are optional, good vibes are mandatory.

name: KISS at Base Training Ride
description:
Join us to work on your endurance and power output at your aerobic threshold (AT) in Zone 2. The exercise will give you endurance and increased performance using fat as energy. A well-developed AT can give you better race performance increase the amount of time before your body uses glycogen stores.

Our Wednesday ride starts with a mass start. Pick the category you think you belong in and if you want to go harder or easier during the ride you can float between groups. All groups ride the same course and are visible.

We are now offering four separate paced rides to better accommodate various fitness levels.
The A cat is for riders with a Zone 2 above 3.80 w/kg.
The B cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 3.2 - 3.80 w/kg.
The C cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 2.5 - 3.19 w/kg.
The D cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 2.2 - 2.49 w/kg.
Remember this when you approach hills and inclines along the way. Stick together to enjoy the draft and companionship. The ride leader will not exceed the advertised pace at any time - even on hills. Please keep an eye on the leader beacon (yellow) and the sweeper beacon (red) to stay in the blob.

So turn on your graph (press G on computer keyboard or select it from on-screen menu in iOS and Android) and paint it blue. Give the body a good foundation for Zwift racing. Discord server Link: https://discord.gg/kBmXhY2

Wednesday's feature a bit of climbing to spice up your base training, I am sure you will enjoy it.

Join us to work on your endurance and power output at your aerobic threshold (AT) in Zone 2. The exercise will give you endurance and increased performance using fat as energy. A well-developed AT can give you better race performance increase the amount of time before your body uses glycogen stores.

name: GRIT Partytime
description:
Join us for our weekly ride/race.
As always this is a group ride. We will start off together with an easy warm up around 2.5wpk.
The pace will pick up for the first few laps but the goal is to stay together. Listen to the leader for instructions.

The last lap or two will be a race. It is key to stay in the group for the start of party time.
Come party with us.

eventSubgroups.name: GRIT Partytime  (B)
eventSubgroups.description: Come join the party, click here to join.

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt6 BIKE
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Cryo-Gen Humpday Hussle
description:
The Cryo-Gen Humpday Hussle has been organized for the many
riders in the Zwift Community who wish to have a paced ride with friends and
like-minded members of the community. The ride has not been organized as a
workout ride but as a social gathering with a mini race at the end. The average
pace will be C & D pace. All riders are encouraged to stick
with the yellow beacon. We are stronger when we work together. Stronger riders
are welcome to assist slower riders back to the pack if they fall off. This
should be a fun, relaxed ride to help you get you ready for your next big
effort, whether it’s a workout, race, or a climb.

name: SWX Wednesday Tempo by Coach Cindy 🇸🇬🇯🇵🇦🇺
description:
Build strength and control every Wednesday with SWX Tempo — a steady endurance builder designed to grow your aerobic engine.
Crafted by Coach Cindy (Train Smart = Race Stronger), this session focuses on sustained tempo efforts to improve muscular endurance, pacing, and long-ride efficiency. Bring smooth cadence, mental focus, and your best zone 3 vibes!

• All levels welcome
• Stay-together mode enabled
• Late join allowed

Connect and learn more about who we are:

name: 3R Endurance Ride
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters.
This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack.
We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief

#Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise
#3r

name: Rapha Women's 100 Training Ride
description:
She’s your greatest competition. Your loudest cheerleader. The one you want to beat. The one you want to win. Rapha and Zwift are celebrating best rivals and fierce friends. The women who give us a wheel to chase. A line to follow. A reason not to hit snooze. Because friendly competition pulls us forward. The harder you go, the further she’ll get.

Join us as we build up to the biggest women's participation event in cycling, the Rapha Women's 100. Returning 5th-6th September 2026.

name: Team I Race Like A Girl Workout
description:
We are in our build phase for a few weeks. Intensity will be added progressively with a variety of workouts targeting top end power. Our favorite high intensity intervals will also continue to make a regular comeback. Use these workouts as a smart addition to your weekly training plans!

ZWIFT WORKOUTS

We have two rides scheduled each week on Wednesdays: 6:05 am EST (with ride leader) and 6:45 pm EST (without ride leader).

Want to join more IRLAG Rides and Runs? Check out our upcoming socials rides through our I Race Like a Girl club feature.

ABOUT ANGELA NAETH & I RACE LIKE A GIRL

Angela Naeth is a professional triathlete, coach, and founder of IRACELIKEAGIRL - a community of girls/women who provide opportunities for females of all ages and abilities to support, encourage and inspire one another in the sport of triathlon, cycling, running and swimming. She's raced for over 10 years from Sprint to Ironman and has coached triathletes/runners/cyclists for the last 7 years. https://www.iracelikeagirl.com/

IRACELIKEAGIRL and GIRLSGETGRITTY team: https://www.iracelikeagirl.com/
E-racing team: https://www.facebook.com/groups/1790418584457764/
IRLAG podcast: https://open.spotify.com/show/4IwS1l9E8S6AzzhFryTxol?si=74a0ddb595fe4ce6

eventSubgroups.name: Team I Race Like A Girl Workout (E)

name: DWGZ Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to the Road DWGZ, a global community fueled by passion, grit, and the love of shared endurance! Our daily (Monday to Friday) endurance rides are  for those who thrive on long efforts, pushing limits, and embracing the burn together.

C Category rolls at a toppy pace of 2.8 – 3.2 w/kg average at the finish.
DWGZ are ideal for those looking to build stamina while holding a steady yet demanding effort.  Whether you ride with the beacon, or hammer with the fliers, you're sure to have a great time.  We take pride in cultivating rider engagement and cultivating a welcoming global community of fun fitness focused peeps.   
Expect consistent pacing, a spicy vibe and a supportive pack of dedicated riders committed to pushing the limits.
No matter where you are in the world, ride with us, suffer with us, and most importantly—finish strong with us.  DWGZ—where endurance, community and passion come together. Welcome to DWGZ ~  Get Gritty! 🚴🔥

name: RO4H Wednesday Spin
description:
The RO4H Wednesday Spin is the midweek social group ride where our friendly, casual, supportive, and respectful RO4H atmosphere welcomes everyone, from the most seasoned Zwifter to the first-time group ride participant. We strive to harness the power of the group draft, encourage comradery, and embrace the RO4H motto that we are better together.

The yellow peloton's pace varies depending on the terrain, but the ride will have an overall average pace of around 19 MPH (30 KPH). The peloton's pace on the flat sections will be slightly faster due to the strong draft effect of the peloton. We strive to remain under 2 W/KG on climbs. Routes are typically flat with short hills; most Zwift routes have some rolling terrain. Sometimes, we take slightly hillier routes to earn different route badges, but most rides will be gently rolling, flatter terrain. Speedsters do have a chance to stretch their legs during the optional "Speed Deacon Sprint" featured on the final lap.

We encourage riders to stick with the yellow peloton led by the ride leader in order to promote the social aspect of the ride and benefit from the large group draft effect. This is unquestionably not a race, despite the belief held by some that every Zwift ride is. We do not pursue flyers, but they are free to fly*.

While our goal is to be a no-drop ride, any pace ultimately represents a great effort for some and a recovery pace for others. Therefore, sweepers are available to assist riders. We do not want anyone to ride alone unless they choose to. The sweeper team will help riders bridge to the leader's peloton or form variable-pace gruppettos. I hear that all the "cool kids" hang out in the sweeper bus anyway.
So join the RO4H Wednesday Spin, where friends are plentiful and we are better together.

*If you are a flyer, please do not organize your flyers using the group in-game chat. This confuses other riders trying to find the main yellow peloton and disrupts the social aspect of the ride. Please use private messages to communicate within your flyer group. We do not use the active fence but will if flyers disrupt the social aspect of this ride.

name: Stage 2: Zwift Games: Hudson Hustle
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: ZLDR Midweek Mosey
description:
Welcome to ZLDR’s Midweek Mosey! As with all ZLDR events please feel free to run at whatever pace suits your training. Whether it’s a nice easy walk or a blazing fast race pace, all Zwifters are welcome and encouraged to join! And don’t worry about the time! Come for whatever time suits your schedule, we are flexible and just want to help you with your running.

The Midweek Mosey occasionally will feature a fun game which Todd (nickname TFN) has titled Trivia Trot. Topics are selected by the lead and all trivia questions will pertain to the selected topic. The game may not happen every week but keep joining for the fun!

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook group:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Strava:
https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Website:
https://www.zldr.club/
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWyn

#zldr_run

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Epic Race - Downtown Dolphin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

name: ZWC Japan Crit Race
description:
Welcome to ZWC Japan Crit Race !!

POWER UPs: None
BIKES: No TT Bikes

CATEGORY:
Use your FTP and then divide by your weight in kg then pick the correct group:
A:4.0 W/kg +
B:3.2 W/kg to 3.99 W/kg
C:2.5 W/kg to 3.19 W/kg
D:Below 2.5 W/kg

- All racers using zPower will be DQ
Heart rate monitors compulsory for all categories

The following persons may be DQ by the organizer's authority.
・Obviously wrong category
・Riding in an unrealistic manner

Final results will be based on ZwiftPower.

Have Fun! Ride On!!

ZWC Japan Crit Race !!

毎週水曜日に開催するナイトクリテリウム!
海外のナイトクリテリウムのようなレースを気軽にZwiftでやりましょう!
短めの距離設定となっていますので、ぜひお気軽にご参加ください。

POWER UPs:アイテムなし
BIKES: TTバイク不可

【カテゴリーに関して】

公正なレースを行うために、最終的なリザルトはzwiftpower.comといたします。
レースに参加をする前に登録を行い、下記のパワーウエイトレシオ【○○W/kg】に該当するカテゴリーでのご参加をお願いいたします。

正しいカテゴリーを選択し、みんなで楽しい走りをしましょう。

A: 4.0 W/kg以上
B: 3.2 W/kg 〜 3.99 W/kg
C: 2.5 W/kg 〜 3.19 W/kg
D: 2.5 W/kg以下


【失格(DQ)について】
zPowerで参加をした場合、心拍計を使用しなかった場合、ZwiftPowerで表示されているカテゴリーよりも下のカテゴリーで参加した場合は全て失格(DQ)となります。


【結果】
最終的なリザルトはzwiftpower.comに準拠します。

【注意】
レース主催者は、レース中の誹謗中傷コメントや、妨害やその他、スポーツマンシップに反する行為を行った参加者を結果から除外することができます。


Have Fun! Ride On!!

#ZJCR #ZWC

name: MHG Run Club
description:
Back in January 2021, Eddie Izzard ran 32 marathons in 31 days. Our community rallied together and joined the action all month long. This inspired us to create the MHG Run Club, which continues Eddie’s incredible efforts of making humanity great.

The MHG Run Club motivates and supports everybody, whether you’re looking for tips to achieve your training goals or looking for a group to bond and socialize with. A light-minded Zwift treadmill runners group, for runners of all abilities, friendly chat and a good laugh :)

Please feel free to join me Clive Finnimore with our official MHG Run Club Lunchtime 5K @ 8KPH on Monday, Wednesday & Fridays, See you there soon :)

Please also join us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/252358412942586/
Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/MHGA
Keep on Running

name: The HERD Morning Ride
description:
New to Zwift, just a little out of shape or recovering from injury? This is the group ride for you! All are welcome to join The Herd on this supportive and social event.

Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.

WE DO RUN THE FENCE! The fence is in place to ensure that new group riders don't get caught up with the flyers and have a bad experience. Bear in mind that the fence will move due to changes in speed on the inclines. We ask that you always ride with the yellow beacon. Please pay attention to messages from the ride leader regarding fence intervals and when to regroup.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/Dr7ZtPV (Please use Push-To-Talk)
Check us out on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/

#herd

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (A)
NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (B)

name: Thomson Bike Tours Endurance Ride
description:
This is a no leader event, just group up with other riders of similar ability and enjoy the social aspect of Zwift. Your goal should be to complete 1 hr of riding at YOUR endurance pace. The overall group will split and smaller groups will form naturally ensuring that everyone gets a good workout and has a bit of fun.
Brought to you by Thomson Bike Tours and CCNS.

The ride is open to all riders, whether you're a Thomson Bike Tours previous guest or not.

Complete the ride to unlock the exclusive Thomson Bike Tours cycling kit.

About Thomson Bike Tours:
Thomson Bike Tours is the Premier Official Tour Operator to the Tour de France and Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift.
https://www.thomsonbiketours.com/

Find us on Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/thomsonbiketours/

About CCNS:
Charles Coaching & Nutrition Services provides highly tailored coaching, testing and nutrition for endurance athletes. https://www.charlescoaching.com/

name: Veselka Ride for Ukraine
description:
Join the Veselka Cycling team on a solidarity ride to support Ukraine.
There may not be much we can do but we must try to do what we can.
Veselka Restaurant has been serving up traditional Ukrainian food in the heart of NYC’s East Village since 1954
The neighborhood is home to one the largest Ukrainian communities outside of Europe and is now on the receiving end of an outpouring of love and support. We are working closely with “Razom for Ukraine”, a non-profit organization assisting the people of that country in their continued quest for democracy and progress. We have also partnered with Ostroy, a NYC cycling label founded in the East Village, to create a limited edition blue and yellow Ukraine jersey based on our team’s traditional design.
All participants in the Solidarity Ride will line up at the start, wearing our Veselka team kit during the event.
We hope this ride will “travel” into different corners of the world - via social media or as a series of like minded rides - all to express peaceful solidarity in support of Ukraine. This will be an on-going weekly ride to continue our efforts to support Ukraine.

Veselka Restaurant and Veselka Cycling Team
*Veselka.com
*RazomforUkraine.org
*Ostroy.com

name: Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown | Women Only
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown | Women Only (B)
Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown | Women Only (C)
Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown | Women Only (D)
Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown | Women Only (E)

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: DIRT Mid-Week Frat Party
description:
Welcome to the Wednesday DIRT Mid-Week Ride, also known as the Frat Party your legs actually enjoy. This is DIRT’s midweek mixer, part social ride, part casual workout, and part slightly sweaty fashion show.

We keep the pace friendly, the banter flowing, and the vibe high. Expect steady efforts, good company, and plenty of chances to reconnect, recover, and ride with your fellow DIRTy friends.

Bring your wildest virtual kit and your most mismatched socks. There are no dress codes here. Just good company, good legs, and questionable fashion choices.

Just a midweek ride with your crew. Come for the party, stay for the good vibes.

Team DIRT stands for Dads Inside Riding Trainers. We are a brotherhood and sisterhood of like minded riders who care deeply about our families and have a deep love for cycling too.

eventSubgroups.name: DIRT Mid-Week Frat Party (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
Welcome to the Wednesday DIRT Base Training Social Ride Ride of Team DIRT

Please join us weekly on Wednesday morning for a C level ride.

Team DIRT is an acronym for Dads Inside Riding Trainers. This group has grown and brought like minded moms and dads together who love to make time for Zwift around work and family.

Please join us on discord: https://discord.gg/sUnwqPZ

And Facebook at: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZWIFTDIRT

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: BMTR Banded Warmup
description:
Let’s warm up and enjoy riding together as one group before today's BMTR Short Adventure, which has three separate categories — B, C, and D — starts in 35 minutes.

Since this event is ‘banded,’ everyone can warm up at a pace that suits them best, while the Zwift ‘Rubberband’ keeps us all together.

There are no official Yellow or Red Beacons for this event. However, you can be sure that most of the time, BMTR Ride Leaders and Sweeps that you know and love will be warming up with you!


JOIN US
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/bmtrzwiftclub
- Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/BMTRZwiftClub
- Zwift: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/BMTR/home
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/bmtr_zwift/

ALL WEEKLY BMTR EVENTS
- https://bmtr.events


BMTR CUSTOM CLOTHING
- https://bmtrzwift.store

name: ODivaZ 2.3 Ride
description:
All riders are welcome to join the ODivaZ 2.3 Ride, led by the Women of TeamODZ, where we take pride in keeping the pace at the advertised average of 2.3 watts/kilogram.  The ride is approximately 1 hour on a flat or semi-flat course (actual time/distance depends on the Zwift course of the day). Contingent on the course, there will be optional sprints and/or short "spicy segment(s)" (2.7-3.0 w/kg). The leader announces any pace changes and will slow to re-group after each sprint or spicy segment. 

This is NOT A RACE!  We invite all riders to stay with the leader (yellow beacon) and enjoy friendly Zwift messaging and the community feel of this ride.  Although we don’t use Double Draft, the regular draft allows the large group around the beacon to move at a fast pace. 

ODZ members vocally chat on an app called Discord. Discord is not required, but the ride experience is enhanced by using it. Click on this link for more information about Discord and related setup: Discord.teamodz.com

For more specifics about this ride and the various Zwift courses, go to: http://www.TeamODZ.com/ODivaZ/

#odz

name: CAT & MOUSE KZR CHASE RACE
description:
CAT & MOUSE KZR CHASE RACE는 다양한 레벨의 라이더들을 위한 추격 레이스 입니다. 각 그룹은 약 2~4분의 간격으로 출발합니다.(코스에 따라 변동가능) 가장 낮은 레벨의 C 그룹이 먼저 출발합니다. 이 레이스의 목표는 다른 그룹에게 잡히기 전에 레이스를 완료하는 것입니다. 우승 그룹을 결정하는 방법은 LEADER가 속한 팩이 골라인을 통과할때 그 그룹의 수가 가장 많은 그룹이 우승하게 됩니다. 코스는 매주 변경되며 코스 길이는 대략 40KM이며 60 분 이내에 종료됩니다. TTT (팀 타임 트라이얼) 라이딩 스타일과 과도한 B.A는 금지되어 있으며, 승리를 위해 리더 또는 스위퍼그룹과 함께하시기 바랍니다.
-
CAT & MOUSE KZR CHASE RACE is a chasing race for different levels of riders. Each group starts with 2~4mins time difference. The lowest level group will start first accordingly.The goal is to finish the route before other group catches . The winning group will be chosen based on the number of people who finished the goal line with a group LEADER. The course changes every week and the route is roughly 40KM long and aims to be finished within 60 mins. TTT(Team Time Trial) riding style and excessive B.A is prohibited and please pace yourself with a group Leader and Sweeper. Starting Time(KST): (C) 20:30, (B) 20:34, (A) 20:36 
-
* 결과와 소식은 즈위프트한국유저그룹에서 확인하세요. https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftkorea/
* 순위 측정과 완주여부를 확인하기 위해 https://zwiftpower.com/에 들어가 가입하고, www.zwift.com에 로그인 ‘My Profile’로 들어가 ‘Connetions’ 메뉴에서 ' Opt-in' 옵션에 동의 하시기 바랍니다. 
-
* The official record will be announced to https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftkorea/ 
* To check your ranking and completion, sign up at https://zwiftpower.com/, sign in at www.zwift.com and agree to the 'Opt-in' option.

#korea #doubledraft

eventSubgroups.name: CAT & MOUSE KZR CHASE RACE  (A)
eventSubgroups.description:
CAT & MOUSE KZR CHASE RACE는 다양한 레벨의 라이더들을 위한 추격 레이스 입니다. 각 그룹은 약 2~4분의 간격으로 출발합니다.(코스에 따라 변동가능) 가장 낮은 레벨의 C 그룹이 먼저 출발합니다. 이 레이스의 목표는 다른 그룹에게 잡히기 전에 레이스를 완료하는 것입니다. 우승 그룹을 결정하는 방법은 LEADER가 속한 팩이 골라인을 통과할때 그 그룹의 수가 가장 많은 그룹이 우승하게 됩니다. 코스는 매주 변경되며 코스 길이는 대략 40KM이며 60 분 이내에 종료됩니다. TTT (팀 타임 트라이얼) 라이딩 스타일과 과도한 B.A는 금지되어 있으며, 승리를 위해 리더 또는 스위퍼그룹과 함께하시기 바랍니다.
-
CAT & MOUSE KZR CHASE RACE is a chasing race for different levels of riders. Each group starts with 2~4mins time difference. The lowest level group will start first accordingly.The goal is to finish the route before other group catches . The winning group will be chosen based on the number of people who finished the goal line with a group LEADER. The course changes every week and the route is roughly 40KM long and aims to be finished within 60 mins. TTT(Team Time Trial) riding style and excessive B.A is prohibited and please pace yourself with a group Leader and Sweeper. Starting Time(KST): (C) 20:30, (B) 20:34, (A) 20:36 
-
* 결과와 소식은 즈위프트한국유저그룹에서 확인하세요. https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftkorea/
* 순위 측정과 완주여부를 확인하기 위해 https://zwiftpower.com/에 들어가 가입하고, www.zwift.com에 로그인 ‘My Profile’로 들어가 ‘Connetions’ 메뉴에서 ' Opt-in' 옵션에 동의 하시기 바랍니다. 
-
* The official record will be announced to https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftkorea/ 
* To check your ranking and completion, sign up at https://zwiftpower.com/, sign in at www.zwift.com and agree to the 'Opt-in' option.

#korea #doubledraft

name: Workout Wednesday Run
description:
Join the Zwift Runners for a group run workout that will be of benefit to all distance runners.

The speeds for each group are based on a threshold speed of A group 15 kph, B 13 kph, C 11 kph, D 9 kph. We will start the intervals at that speed but increase the speed of the intervals we get into the workout. We encourage runners to choose the group closest to the effort level you want to run at and to keep to the nominal speed for that group to maintain the group dynamic. However if these speeds are significantly too low or high for you then you can choose to run in the group that is closest and then adjust the target speed up to 10% up or down in the game or via the Companion app.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Running in general then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook group or zwift.com/run #gozwiftrun #wow

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt7 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt8 BIKE
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: BMTR Short Adventure
description:
The BMTR Short Adventure focuses on enjoying a fun group experience while participating in endurance-paced cycling.

Our ride leaders are experienced, friendly, and ready to make sure you have a great experience. They'll help keep the ride fun and within the right pace for your group!

This event is mainly about "Zone 2 Endurance" riding, which means we’ll be cycling at a comfortable pace. Each category has an average watts per kilogram (w/kg) range designed to keep most riders in their "Zone 2 Endurance" or low "Zone 3 Tempo" zones. Just choose the category that fits your Functional Threshold Power (FTP) or the one that Zwift assigns to you, and you’ll be all set for an enjoyable ride!


**Join Us on Any or All of the Following Platforms!**
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/bmtrzwiftclub
- Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/BMTRZwiftClub
- Zwift: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/BMTR/home
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/bmtr_zwift/

**To Find All 10 Weekly BMTR Events**
- https://bmtr.events

name: Happy 100k p/b Team ODZ
description: Join us for Happy 100k, an endurance ride taking on slightly lumpier courses. On climbs pace will go up based on the climb's duration so be prepared to work a bit to stay with the yellow beacon. Consider it a B/B+ ride with a bit of spice. We'll regroup after efforts to utilize the benefits of the blob with stronger riders continuing to work on the front while those needing recovery between efforts can sit in and draft. Overall average will be 3.2-4.0wkg by the finish.

name: PAOLO BARBERA & SCANNELLATORI SERIALI WORKOUT
description:
"Scannellatori Seriali" is a large community of cyclists, triathletes, and runners. We invite you to join our community by following our Instagram page at https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ or contacting us on Facebook.
 
Coach Paolo Barbera (Please visit www.heycoach.it )   is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

name: Never Not Riding by Specialized Asia
description:
Join us for a fun weekly ride led by Specialized Team and ambassadors. Each week you will have the opportunity to ride different bikes depending on the route. Some days we will do tempo flat efforts on our road bikes and some days we will take you on the road less travelled!

So lets put on your cycling kit, turn up your fan and ride with us. Do tag us on IG and use #nevernotriding hashtag!

37 – 40kmph

eventSubgroups.name: Never Not Riding by Specialized Asia (D)

name: CHINA ZCRC Group Training Ride
description:
欢迎参加CHINA ZCRC Group Training Ride，这场周三夜晚的线上团练由ZCRC和G7 Cycling Club联合举办。
 
在团练期间，我们的领队会实时发布本次团练课程的指令，训练的目的可能会涉及到短时间歇、阈值训练等，通过这些训练来提升你的FTP、FRC和最大功率能力。
 
同时，你将会在这一次的团练中认识许多不同的新朋友，我们非常欢迎来自全世界各地的骑行爱好者加入我们的团练，如果你感觉精力充沛，可以完全按照领队的指示在集团前方进行课程训练，如果你感觉余力不足，尝试在集团中降低功率以享受充足的跟风效果，我们由衷地希望所有的伙伴都能拥有一次完美的团练体验！
 
每场团练的最后，我们通常会进行一场不计排名的小比赛，为了小比赛的公平性，请确保你始终保持在领队身后直至比赛开始，然后在最后的小比赛尝试榨干你的全部体能。
 
* B组一般会进行适合3.0-4.0w/kg水平车手的团练课程
 
* E组通常是自由强度的骑行
 
欢迎关注我们ZCRC的其他公开活动并且参与其中：
 
每周一 /北京时间 晚上19:05：
CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km
 
每周三 /北京时间 晚上20:05：
CHINA ZCRC Group Training Ride
 
每周五 /北京时间 晚上20:00：
CHINA ZCRC Friday Indoor Race
 
每周六 /北京时间 晚上19:30：
CHINA ZCRC Winter Challenge Series
 
*欢迎你关注并且加入我们的其他社交平台和媒体：
 
*QQ群: 626918793
*微信群: hzw-hzw-hzw
*新浪微博: ZWIFT_CHINA
*Instagram: ZWIFT_CHINA
 
This group-training ride is brought to you by ZCRC and G7 Cycling Club from China.
 
During the ride, we will cover a broad range of exercises and focus on using short time intervals to improve your FTP, PMAX Power and FRC Capacity etc.
 
In the meantime, you will definitely meet new friends by riding with us. We warmly welcome all riders from all over the world! If you are feeling fresh, hop on to the front with the leader. If you are tired, then rest with the group by surfing the draft. We hope everyone will have a great workout session!
 
Group Training Rule: All riders should behind and group with the beacon (leader or sweeper), follow the session pace which leader say. No surge, no attack until final mini race. Let's respect leader and group.
 
*There will be a mini race at the end of the ride. In order to be included in the final results, make sure you ride behind the group leader before the mini race starts. Let’s all keep the mini race fair and square.
 
*Group B will have workout session for 3.0-4.0w/kg riders.
 
*Group E will have free ride and pace for all category riders.
 
Following ZWIFT events about G7 Cycling Club:
 
# CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km
(Monday 11:05 UTC)
 
# CHINA ZCRC Group Training Ride
(Wednesday 12:00 UTC)
 
# CHINA ZCRC Friday Indoor Race
(Friday 12:00 UTC)
 
# CHINA ZCRC Winter Challenge Series
(Saturday 11:30 UTC)
 
*If you are Chinese, we welcome you to join our QQ Group 626918793. If you are not, we welcome you to follow our Instagram account @zwift_china. We will post result of the race on both platforms.

name: Stage 4: Zwift Games: Peaky Pave
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: USAT Social Fun Run
description: Come for the run, stay for the fun! The USAT Social Fun run is designed to encourage and build community and discussion – it is all the perks of running in a group from the comfort of your favorite treadmill! Come run with USAT Level 2e Coach Zach Adams and friends. Join the Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/512331383087033 and ask questions while engaging in live conversation via the discord app during the run here: https://discord.gg/y8b5tvvS . This run is designed specifically to be an easy run. So, embrace the aerobic adaptations and come have fun!

name: Ascenders - Slow Paulie Ride
description:
English:
Ascenders and friends welcome all new Zwifters, healing and para-athletes, casual riders to join us on an easy ride to help you get into the Zwifting World at a pace you can hold your own.

Bahasa Melayu:
Pasukan Ascenders dan rakan-rakan mengalu-alukan semua Zwifters, penyembuhan dan para-atlet baharu, pelumba kasual untuk menyertai kami dalam perjalanan yang mudah untuk membantu anda memasuki Dunia Zwifting pada kadar yang anda boleh tahan sendiri.

Chinese (Simplified)
Ascenders 和朋友们欢迎所有新的 Zwifter、康复和辅助运动员、休闲骑手加入我们，轻松骑行，帮助您以自己可以控制的速度进入 Zwifting 世界。

French:
L'équipe Ascenders et ses amis souhaitent la bienvenue à tous les nouveaux Zwifters, guérisseurs et para-athlètes, coureurs occasionnels pour nous rejoindre dans une balade facile pour vous aider à entrer dans le monde Zwifting à un rythme que vous pouvez maintenir.

Danish:
Ascenders og venner byder alle nye Zwiftere, healing- og para-atleter, afslappede ryttere velkommen til at slutte sig til os på en nem tur for at hjælpe dig med at komme ind i Zwifting-verdenen i et tempo, du kan holde dit eget.

Italian:
Ascenders e i suoi amici danno il benvenuto a tutti i nuovi Zwifter, guaritori e para-atleti, corridori occasionali che si uniscono a noi in una corsa facile per aiutarti a entrare nel mondo Zwifting a un ritmo che puoi tenere tuo.

Japanese:
Ascenders チームとその友人たちは、すべての新しい Zwifter、ヒーリング アスリート、パラアスリート、カジュアル ライダーを歓迎し、自分のペースで Zwifting の世界に足を踏み入れるのに役立つ簡単なライドに参加します。

Korean:
Ascenders 팀과 친구들은 모든 새로운 Zwifters, 치유 및 장애인 운동 선수, 캐주얼 라이더를 환영합니다. 여러분이 자신만의 속도로 Zwifting 세계에 들어갈 수 있도록 도와줍니다.

Portugese:
A equipe Ascenders e seus amigos dão as boas-vindas a todos os novos Zwifters, curadores e para-atletas, pilotos casuais para se juntarem a nós em um passeio fácil para ajudá-lo a entrar no Zwifting World em um ritmo que você pode manter.

Spanish:
El equipo de Ascenders y sus amigos dan la bienvenida a todos los nuevos Zwifters, curanderos y para-atletas, ciclistas ocasionales para que se unan a nosotros en un viaje fácil para ayudarlos a ingresar al mundo de Zwifting a un ritmo que puedan mantener.

Tagalok (Filipino):
Ang Ascenders at mga kaibigan ay malugod na tinatanggap ang lahat ng bagong Zwifters, healing at para-athlete, casual riders na sumama sa amin sa isang madaling biyahe para tulungan kang makapasok sa Zwifting World sa bilis na kaya mo.

Thai:
ทีม Ascenders และผองเพื่อน ยินดีต้อนรับ Zwifters ใหม่ ทั้งผู้รักษาและนักกีฬาพารา ไรเดอร์แบบสบาย ๆ เพื่อเข้าร่วมกับเราในการขี่ที่ง่ายดายเพื่อช่วยให้คุณเข้าสู่ Zwifting World ด้วยความเร็วที่คุณกำหนดเองได้

Join the Ascenders FB group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/AscendersZwiftOpens a new window
Discord Ride Chat: https://discord.com/invite/cBfQ5jkrPhOpens a new window
#ascendersteamsg #gozwift #rideon

name: ZZRC Group Workout
description:
A very warm welcome to our ZZRC Group Workout. 

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

This is banded ride designed to put some structure and FUN into our social rides on Zwift! Each week we will showcase a different Zwift workout. 

The power targets are based on your individual FTP so come join us as we encourage each other to elevate our fitness to new heights on Zwift. 

Whilst we enjoy having a yellow beacon on our workouts to give support  , occasionally it’s not always possible. The workout will continue as normal and will give you the instructions required throughout despite no beacon . So please enjoy the challenge . 

Join the ZZRC Club on the Companion App, follow us on Facebook, but, most of all, enjoy the ride. 

#zzrc

name: (Rubber-Banded) Ride with James' Friends!
description:
Join (some of) James' friends as we take on a number of different, varied routes across a number of different worlds.

This ride is banded. All riders will stay together regardless of their pace.

To keep up with latest events and news, please join the club here: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/389fbdf0-9cd7-4b42-8f76-4d1b6af240ae

name: USMeS - Boot Camp🥾 [C] 2.2 - 2.8w/kg
description:
Boot Camp 2.2-2.8
Discipline. Effort. Results.

Welcome to Bootcamp, your weekly C-paced ride where discipline meets intensity. This isn’t just another group ride—this is where you put in the work.

Pace: 2.2–2.8 w/kg 
Average: ~2.5 w/kg overall
Fence: In use—and it has no mercy. Stay behind the beacon or risk being zapped.

Ride Format:
    • Steady endurance pacing throughout
    • Segment efforts are highly encouraged—bring your best watts
    • Sprints and climbs will test your focus
    • Regroup quickly behind the beacon after each effort

Expectations:
Respect the fence—it’s there to keep everyone disciplined
Use segments to push hard, then fall back in formation
Ride smart, ride steady, and support each other

This is the ride where you earn your progress. Bootcamp is all about consistency, commitment, and a little bit of grit.

Fall in, work hard, and finish strong.

Please join our Discord https://discord.gg/uyE2eUh4yE  and join our Zwift Club and FB by searching “US Military eSports”

#conqueringlimits    #challengeaccepted

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Epic Race - Downtown Dolphin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: TCT Group Ride - Transplant Cycling Team
description: Club rides, racing and training together to raise awareness around organ and blood stem cell donation and transplantation and how this vital service can allow transplant athletes push through any perceived barriers.

eventSubgroups.name: TCT Group Ride - Transplant Cycling Team (E)

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt8 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: THE SYN 100
description:
Join us for "The SYN 100" group ride on TT bikes! 

This ride is all about teamwork, smooth rotations, and catching up with our community. 
Whether you’re joining to set the pace or sit in and enjoy the draft, what matters most is that you have fun!

We will be taking on 100 km at an average pace of 2.5-3w/kg, ETA +- 2.5 hours. 
Everyone will be on the Canyon Speedmax TT bike — so we’ll be rolling in full style and speed. Double draft is on! 

Perfect for boosting your stamina and endurance, this ride challenges you to hold a steady power output for a sustained duration.

Late join is active for the first 30 minutes of this ride.


3 SPRINTS WITH LEAD-OUT
Tempus Fugit is perfect for time trial efforts, group pacing, and steady endurance work. 
It features the Fuego Flats Sprint — 500 meters of all-out power!
We are riding 5 laps on Tempus Fugit. The first 3 laps we will be organising a sprint with lead-out! 


FINISHING WITH A CHASE
At the end of this ride we have "The spicy 5 ". We’ll lift the pace near the end with 5km to go and go for a fast finish for those who still have energy left. 
Others can just choose to easy spin at a nice pace to the finish line.


UNLOCK THE SYNDICATE CLUB KIT
Completing the full 100km ride today will result in unlocking the inverted SYN Kit that you will be wearing on this ride!
SYN Cycling Club also has other rides that unlock this kit, make sure to check them out!


DISCOVER MORE IN THE SYN ZWIFT CLUB
Enjoyed this ride? Feel free to join our Zwift Club (SYN Cycling Club), and discover all our events:
https://bit.ly/SYNZwiftClub

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt9 BIKE
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Hercules - Wild West Wednesday
description:
Join our Wild West Wednesday - a super friendly and inclusive group run on Zwift!

You can walk, jog or race, everyone is welcome.

Expect great chat, good vibes, and a welcoming atmosphere for all runners, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Leader is happy to run as slow as the slowest runner to make everyone feel included in the event.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

name: Rapha Women's 100 Training Ride
description:
She’s your greatest competition. Your loudest cheerleader. The one you want to beat. The one you want to win. Rapha and Zwift are celebrating best rivals and fierce friends. The women who give us a wheel to chase. A line to follow. A reason not to hit snooze. Because friendly competition pulls us forward. The harder you go, the further she’ll get.

Join us as we build up to the biggest women's participation event in cycling, the Rapha Women's 100. Returning 5th-6th September 2026.

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: Ascenders Midweek Ride
description:
About Midweek Ride:
This ride offers a balanced mix of flat roads and hill climbs. Riders will follow the pace set by the ride leader to ensure we complete the event together as a group.
It’s perfect for novices and newer riders looking for steady group climbing.

name: Stage 5: Zwift Games: Three Step Sisters
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1

name: Phoenix Rising Midweek Meander
description:
It's time for Phoenix Rising's Midweek Meander! This is a D paced ride designed to allow a wide range of riders to join in the fun and get what they need, whether it's a workout, warm up/down or recovery. Join us for this chatty, social ride, where riders of all levels can experience a sense of community with others from all over the world. The pace will be in the range of 1.4 - 1.7 w/kg but may go slightly higher on any climbs and lower on descents depending on the ride leader's weight. Sticking with the yellow beacon rather than flying ahead is appreciated. The fence will be activated as a guide and sweeps will be on hand to assist those who lose the draft. We want everyone to feel supported and part of the group. Our routes change weekly, promising fresh challenges and new horizons on routes that are always somewhat flat-ish. Let's soar together as we chase away those midweek blahs!

For more information on all our weekly events, join our club Phoenix Rising on Zwift Companion.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/mNMva8ekJR
Check us out on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/615972979730125/

name: Stage 5: Zwift Games: Three Step Sisters | Advanced
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: BC Bike Race Endurance Workout
description:
Since 2007, athletes from 65 different countries have been racing the Ultimate Singletrack Adventure in British Columbia, Canada and now, BC Bike Race is bringing you a new experience to Zwift.
The BC Bike Race Endurance Workout is a weekly ride designed to help build your endurance during the winter months in preparation for the summer to shred singletrack.

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.
